page.title: Marbella Pride 2026: The Ultimate Yacht Party Experience

data.meta_description: Celebrate Marbella Pride 2026 with a luxury yacht party from Puerto Banús. 12 pax, open bar, and stunning Costa del Sol views. Book your charter today.
data.summary: Marbella Pride 2026 offers the perfect occasion for a yacht party. Charter one of our luxury boats from Puerto Banús for an unforgettable celebration on the Costa del Sol.
key_facts: Marbella Pride 2026 takes place in June, with events across Puerto Banús and Marbella Marina.
Our fleet includes yachts for up to 12 guests, all departing from Puerto Banús.
Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, and 21% IVA.
Tier B yachts like the Mangusta 80 include a free jet ski for your party.
Prices start from €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39.
Book via WhatsApp for custom pricing on larger yachts like the Ferretti 94 or Canados 86.
Popular Pride routes include cruising past La Concha, Cala del Faro, and Cala Cortés.
All yachts are fully equipped with sound systems for your playlist.

faq.q: What is the best yacht for a Marbella Pride party?
faq.a: For a lively party with up to 12 guests, the Mangusta 80 (24m) is ideal—it includes a free jet ski and plenty of deck space. For smaller groups, the Azimut 58 Flybridge offers a spacious flybridge for dancing and socialising.

faq.q: How much does a yacht party cost for Marbella Pride?
faq.a: Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39, which includes skipper, drinks, and snacks. For larger yachts like the Mangusta 80, the minimum charter is 4 hours at €4,719. Other yachts are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What is included in a yacht charter for Pride?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring your guests and your playlist.

faq.q: Can I bring my own decorations or DJ for the yacht?
faq.a: Yes, you are welcome to bring decorations and a Bluetooth speaker or connect your device to the yacht's sound system. A DJ is also allowed, but please let us know in advance so we can ensure space and power availability.

faq.q: Where do the yachts depart from for Marbella Pride?
faq.a: All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, the iconic marina just 5 minutes from Marbella's Golden Mile. You can also arrange pick-up from Marbella Marina if needed, subject to availability.

faq.q: What is the best time of day for a Pride yacht party?
faq.a: Late afternoon charters (4pm to sunset) are popular for Pride, as you can enjoy the golden hour over the Mediterranean. Evening charters (7pm onwards) let you see the coastline lit up and head back to Puerto Banús for nightlife.

faq.q: Can we swim or stop at a beach during the charter?
faq.a: Absolutely. Popular stops include Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the waters off Cabopino. Your skipper will anchor at a safe spot for swimming. Just remember to bring towels and sunscreen.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht for Marbella Pride 2026?
faq.a: Booking is easy—just send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, group size, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send you a secure payment link. Early booking is recommended as Pride charters sell out quickly.

data.body_html:
Marbella Pride 2026 is set to be the biggest celebration of diversity and freedom on the Costa del Sol. From colourful parades in Puerto Banús to vibrant parties along the Golden Mile, the energy is electric. But for the ultimate Pride experience, nothing beats celebrating on the water. A Marbella Pride yacht party combines the best of the Mediterranean with the spirit of Pride—think open decks, chilled cava, and the coastline of Marbella as your backdrop. Whether you're planning an intimate gathering or a full-blown bash, our fleet of luxury yachts from Puerto Banús has you covered.

Why Choose a Yacht for Marbella Pride 2026?

Pride in Marbella is all about visibility, joy, and community. A yacht party elevates that experience: you get your own private space, a dedicated skipper, and the freedom to cruise along the coast at your own pace. With temperatures in June averaging 27°C, the sea breeze is a welcome relief from the crowds. Plus, you can anchor at secluded spots like Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés for a swim between celebrations. It's the perfect way to kick off or wind down your Pride festivities.

Our Fleet for Pride Yacht Parties

We offer a range of yachts suited to different group sizes and budgets. All depart from Puerto Banús, the heart of Marbella's luxury scene. Here's a quick overview:

YachtLengthMax GuestsStarting Price
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749/2h
Azimut 3912.5m11€749/2h
Mangusta 8024m12€4,719/4h
Azimut 58 Flybridge17.6m12On request
Ferretti 9429m12On request

For a full list of available yachts, visit our main fleet page.

What's Included in Your Pride Charter

Every Marbella Pride yacht party charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). That means no hidden costs—just show up with your guests and your Pride playlist. For Tier B yachts like the Mangusta 80, you also get a free jet ski to add extra fun to your day.

Best Routes for a Pride Yacht Party

From Puerto Banús, you have several stunning options. A classic route heads west past the luxury villas of the Golden Mile, towards Cabopino and its natural dunes. Alternatively, cruise east to Estepona and anchor near the old town or the chic marina. For a shorter trip, stay close to Marbella Marina and enjoy views of La Concha mountain. Your skipper will tailor the route to your preferences, including stops for swimming and photos.

How to Book Your Pride Yacht Party

Booking is straightforward. Send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, group size, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send you a secure payment link. Early booking is highly recommended as Pride charters sell out quickly. For more details on our fleet and pricing, check out our boat rental hub.

Tips for an Unforgettable Pride on the Water

  • Bring your own playlist: All yachts have Bluetooth or AUX connectivity for your music.
  • Pack sunscreen and hats: The Mediterranean sun is strong, even in June.
  • Consider a sunset charter: Depart around 5pm for golden hour views and a gentle return.
  • Coordinate with Pride events: Check the official Marbella Pride schedule to align your charter with parades and parties.
  • Book a larger yacht for groups: The Mangusta 80 (24m) or Ferretti 94 (29m) offer plenty of space for dancing and socialising.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the best yacht for a Marbella Pride party?

For a lively party with up to 12 guests, the Mangusta 80 (24m) is ideal—it includes a free jet ski and plenty of deck space. For smaller groups, the Azimut 58 Flybridge offers a spacious flybridge for dancing and socialising.

How much does a yacht party cost for Marbella Pride?

Prices start at €749 for 2 hours on the Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39, which includes skipper, drinks, and snacks. For larger yachts like the Mangusta 80, the minimum charter is 4 hours at €4,719. Other yachts are priced on request via WhatsApp.

What is included in a yacht charter for Pride?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). You just bring your guests and your playlist.

Can I bring my own decorations or DJ for the yacht?

Yes, you are welcome to bring decorations and a Bluetooth speaker or connect your device to the yacht's sound system. A DJ is also allowed, but please let us know in advance so we can ensure space and power availability.

Where do the yachts depart from for Marbella Pride?

All our yachts depart from Puerto Banús, the iconic marina just 5 minutes from Marbella's Golden Mile. You can also arrange pick-up from Marbella Marina if needed, subject to availability.

What is the best time of day for a Pride yacht party?

Late afternoon charters (4pm to sunset) are popular for Pride, as you can enjoy the golden hour over the Mediterranean. Evening charters (7pm onwards) let you see the coastline lit up and head back to Puerto Banús for nightlife.

Can we swim or stop at a beach during the charter?

Absolutely. Popular stops include Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the waters off Cabopino. Your skipper will anchor at a safe spot for swimming. Just remember to bring towels and sunscreen.

How do I book a yacht for Marbella Pride 2026?

Booking is easy—just send us a WhatsApp message with your preferred date, group size, and any special requests. We'll confirm availability and send you a secure payment link. Early booking is recommended as Pride charters sell out quickly.
